sections.paragraph:
Ch. fut. יִפֵל (compare Syr. ܢܶܦܶܠ, in Targ. freq. יִפֻּל), i.q. Heb.-

(1) to fall-(a) to fall down, Dan 7:20 4:28 , קָל מִן־שְׁמַיָּא נְפַל “a voice fell from heaven,” (compare Isa 9:7).-(b) to fall out, to happen, Ezr 7:20.

(2) to be cast down, Dan 3:23 (Syr. ܢܦܠ, to be cast into prison); to prostrate oneself, Dan 3:6 7:10 , 11 עַל אַנְפֹּוהִי Dan 2:46.
